title: Chief Operating Officer
summary: The operating leader who turns strategy into disciplined execution, delivery rhythm, measurable sequencing, and cross-functional alignment.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Operating Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The operating leader who turns strategy into disciplined execution, delivery rhythm, measurable sequencing, and cross-functional alignment.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Translate institutional strategy into operational roadmaps, milestone systems, execution cadence, and accountable delivery across the company.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
